llm_training.natural_language_description: The Vacuum Flask (Black) is a durable, double-walled insulated beverage container manufactured from food-grade stainless steel, with a capacity of 500ml. It is sold as retail merchandise through the GrabFood Singapore platform, specifically listed under the Dunkin' Donuts - Funan outlet, priced at SGD 28.00. This item is not a food or beverage product but rather a piece of kitchenware engineered to maintain the temperature of liquids — keeping hot beverages hot and cold beverages cold for extended periods — through vacuum insulation technology that eliminates convective and conductive heat transfer between the inner and outer walls. The black exterior finish provides a sleek, modern aesthetic. As a non-consumable physical merchandise item, it has no nutritional composition: it contributes zero calories, zero macronutrients (protein, fat, carbohydrate), and zero micronutrients to the diet. All core macro values are naturally zero because the item contains no food substance. It is suitable for all dietary preferences and restrictions, including vegetarian, vegan, halal, kosher, gluten-free, and dairy-free lifestyles, and presents no allergen concerns. From a clinical perspective, this item is entirely irrelevant to the dietary management of hypertension, Type 2 Diabetes, or cardiovascular disease, as it has no direct dietary impact whatsoever. Its inclusion in a food database record reflects the comprehensive product catalogue of the GrabFood Singapore platform, which encompasses both food items and non-food merchandise accessories. The vacuum flask is a common household and office drinkware item widely used across Singapore and Southeast Asia.

notes: This record represents a non-food merchandise item — a stainless steel vacuum flask of 500ml capacity — sold via GrabFood Singapore at Dunkin' Donuts - Funan for SGD 28.00. It is not a consumable food or beverage product. All core macro values (energy_kcal, protein_g, fat_g, carbohydrate_g) are naturally zero because this item contains no food substance whatsoever; these are confirmed zero per the nature of the item. energy_kcal is naturally zero as this is a non-food physical container. protein_g is naturally zero as this item contains no protein. fat_g is naturally zero as this item contains no fat. carbohydrate_g is naturally zero as this item contains no carbohydrates. sugar_g is naturally zero. dietary_fibre_g is naturally zero. sodium_mg is naturally zero. saturated_fat_g is naturally zero. All micronutrient fields (monounsaturated_fat_g, polyunsaturated_fat_g, trans_fat_g, potassium_mg, calcium_mg, iron_mg, cholesterol_mg, vitamin_c_mg, vitamin_a_mcg_rae, vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg, vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg, vitamin_b3_niacin_mg, vitamin_b6_mg, vitamin_b12_mcg, folate_mcg_dfe, vitamin_d_mcg, vitamin_e_mg, phosphorus_mg, magnesium_mg, zinc_mg, selenium_mcg, water_g) are set to -1 as they are not applicable or reported for a non-food merchandise item; these sentinel values reflect the absence of any nutritional composition data for a physical container. glycemic_index is set to 1 (effectively zero) per Veritas convention for non-food/zero-carbohydrate items; gi_category is low (GI=1 is ≤55); glycemic_load_per_serving is 0.0 as carbohydrate_g is 0. Multilingual names provided per Singaporean context rules (English, Chinese Simplified, Chinese Traditional, Malay, Tamil, Hindi). FoodOn ontology anchor set to FOODON_03400361 (food container) as closest_parent; FoodEx2 and SNOMED CT set to none with gap notes as no defensible codes exist for non-food kitchenware merchandise in those systems.
